sentences.target: Je mentionne ton nom dans le mail.
sentences.reading: /ʒə mɑ̃.sjɔn tɔ̃ nɔ̃ dɑ̃ lə mɛl/

translations.fr: Je mentionne ton nom dans le mail.
translations.ipa: /ʒə mɑ̃.sjɔn tɔ̃ nɔ̃ dɑ̃ lə mɛl/
translations.en: I'll mention your name in the email.
translations.es: Voy a mencionar tu nombre en el correo.
translations.de: Ich erwähne deinen Namen in der E-Mail.
translations.zh-Hans: 我会在邮件里提到你的名字。
translations.yue: 我會喺電郵入面提到你個名。
translations.ru: Я упомяну твоё имя в письме.
translations.pt: Vou mencionar seu nome no e-mail.
translations.vi: Tôi sẽ nhắc đến tên bạn trong email.
translations.nl: Ik vermeld je naam in de e-mail.
translations.uk: Я згадаю твоє ім’я в електронному листі.
translations.hi: मैं ईमेल में तुम्हारा नाम उल्लेख करूँगा.
translations.el: Θα αναφέρω το όνομά σου στο email.
translations.nb: Jeg nevner navnet ditt i e-posten.
translations.id: Aku akan menyebut namamu di email.
translations.sv: Jag nämner ditt namn i mejlet.
translations.ro: Voi menționa numele tău în e-mail.
translations.da: Jeg nævner dit navn i mailen.
translations.ja: メールであなたの名前を出します。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 1st person singular; marks the speaker as the subject.
Main verb, present indicative, 1st person singular; action performed by the subject.
Possessive determiner, 2nd person singular, masculine singular; modifies 'nom'.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of 'mentionne'.
Preposition introducing a prepositional phrase indicating location/context.
Definite article, masculine singular; determines 'mail'.
Common noun; object of the preposition 'dans'.

sentences.target: Tu mentionnes ça dans le rapport, s'il te plaît.
sentences.reading: /ty mɑ̃.sjɔn sa dɑ̃ lə ʁa.pɔʁ sil tə plɛ/

translations.fr: Tu mentionnes ça dans le rapport, s'il te plaît.
translations.ipa: /ty mɑ̃.sjɔn sa dɑ̃ lə ʁa.pɔʁ sil tə plɛ/
translations.en: Please mention that in the report.
translations.es: Por favor, menciona eso en el informe.
translations.it: Per favore, menziona quello nel rapporto.
translations.zh-Hans: 请在报告里提到那件事。
translations.yue: 麻煩喺報告入面提一提嗰件事。
translations.pt: Por favor, menciona isso no relatório.
translations.vi: Xin vui lòng đề cập điều đó trong báo cáo.
translations.ar: من فضلك اذكر ذلك في التقرير.
translations.nl: Vermeld dat alsjeblieft in het rapport.
translations.uk: Будь ласка, згадай це в звіті.
translations.hu: Kérlek, említsd meg ezt a jelentésben.
translations.hi: कृपया इसे रिपोर्ट में उल्लेख करें.
translations.pl: Proszę wspomnij o tym w raporcie.
translations.ro: Te rog să menționezi asta în raport.
translations.fi: Ole hyvä ja mainitse se raportissa.
translations.ja: レポートにそれを記載してください。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 2nd person singular.
Main verb, present indicative, 2nd person singular; agrees with 'Tu'.
Demonstrative pronoun; direct object of 'mentionnes'.
Preposition introducing the location/context of the action.
Definite article, masculine singular; determines 'rapport'.
Common noun; object of the preposition 'dans'.
Subordinating conjunction 'si' elided before vowel; introduces a conditional clause in the polite formula.
3rd person singular subject pronoun; subject of 'plaît' within the formula.
2nd person singular clitic pronoun (indirect object); complements 'plaît'.
Verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; part of the idiomatic polite expression 's'il te plaît' ('please').

sentences.target: N'oublie pas de mentionner la date limite.
sentences.reading: /nu.bli pa də mɑ̃.sjɔ.ne la dat li.mit/

translations.fr: N'oublie pas de mentionner la date limite.
translations.ipa: /nu.bli pa də mɑ̃.sjɔ.ne la dat li.mit/
translations.en: Don't forget to mention the deadline.
translations.es: No te olvides de mencionar la fecha límite.
translations.de: Vergiss nicht, die Frist zu erwähnen.
translations.it: Non dimenticare di menzionare la scadenza.
translations.yue: 唔好忘記提下截止日期。
translations.pt: Não se esqueça de mencionar o prazo.
translations.he: אל תשכח להזכיר את המועד האחרון.
translations.vi: Đừng quên đề cập đến hạn chót.
translations.nl: Vergeet niet de deadline te noemen.
translations.hu: Ne felejtsd el megemlíteni a határidőt.
translations.hi: अंतिम तिथि का उल्लेख करना मत भूलना.
translations.el: Μην ξεχάσεις να αναφέρεις την προθεσμία.
translations.ro: Nu uita să menționezi termenul limită.
translations.ja: 締め切りに言及するのを忘れないでください。

tokens.explanation: Clitic negation particle elided before vowel; first element of the discontinuous negation 'ne … pas'.
Verb in the imperative, 2nd person singular; main predicate of the command.
Negative adverb; second element of 'ne … pas' negation.
Preposition introducing an infinitival complement ('de mentionner').
Infinitive verb functioning as the complement of 'oublie de'.
Definite article, feminine singular; determines 'date'.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of 'mentionner'.
Adjective, feminine singular; modifies 'date' (as in 'deadline').

sentences.target: On mentionne le budget pendant la réunion.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ mɑ̃.sjɔn lə bydʒɛ pɑ̃.dɑ̃ la ʁe.y.njɔ̃/

translations.fr: On mentionne le budget pendant la réunion.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ mɑ̃.sjɔn lə bydʒɛ pɑ̃.dɑ̃ la ʁe.y.njɔ̃/
translations.en: We mention the budget during the meeting.
translations.es: Mencionamos el presupuesto durante la reunión.
translations.de: Wir sprechen das Budget in der Sitzung an.
translations.it: Menzioniamo il budget durante la riunione.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们在会议上提到预算。
translations.yue: 我哋喺會議上提到預算。
translations.pt: Mencionamos o orçamento durante a reunião.
translations.he: אנחנו מזכירים את התקציב במהלך הפגישה.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đề cập đến ngân sách trong cuộc họp.
translations.nl: We noemen het budget tijdens de vergadering.
translations.uk: Ми згадуємо бюджет під час наради.
translations.hi: बैठक में हम बजट का ज़िक्र करते हैं.
translations.el: Αναφέρουμε τον προϋπολογισμό κατά τη διάρκεια της συνάντησης.
translations.ja: 会議中に予算に触れます。

tokens.explanation: Indefinite personal pronoun used as subject; often corresponds to 'we'; triggers 3rd person singular verb form.
Main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; agrees with 'On'.
Definite article, masculine singular; determines 'budget'.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of 'mentionne'.
Preposition indicating the time frame of the action.
Definite article, feminine singular; determines 'réunion'.
Common noun, feminine singular; object of the preposition 'pendant'.
